meaning: adj.[医](子宫中)胚胎植入前的
examples: A technique already in use is called preimplantation genetic diagnosis (PGD).
Preimplantation development of reconstructed embryos by nuclear transfer was studied.
Preimplantation genetic diagnosis (PGD), the technique used to see if an embryo is a match, is legally permitted now if a genetic condition is present in a family.
